/home/ynistico-iit.local/miniforge3/envs/muse/bin/x86_64-conda-linux-gnu-c++ -fvisibility-inlines-hidden -fmessage-length=0 -march=nocona -mtune=haswell -ftree-vectorize -fPIC -fstack-protector-strong -fno-plt -O2 -ffunction-sections -pipe -isystem /home/ynistico-iit.local/miniforge3/envs/muse/include -std=c++11 -Wl,-O2 -Wl,--sort-common -Wl,--as-needed -Wl,-z,relro -Wl,-z,now -Wl,--disable-new-dtags -Wl,--gc-sections -Wl,--allow-shlib-undefined -Wl,-rpath,/home/ynistico-iit.local/miniforge3/envs/muse/lib -Wl,-rpath-link,/home/ynistico-iit.local/miniforge3/envs/muse/lib -L/home/ynistico-iit.local/miniforge3/envs/muse/lib -Wl,--dependency-file=CMakeFiles/algebra-test.dir/link.d "CMakeFiles/algebra-test.dir/src/algebra_test.cpp.o" -o /home/ynistico-iit.local/dls_ws_home/muse/muse_ws/devel/.private/iit_commons/lib/iit_commons/algebra-test  /home/ynistico-iit.local/miniforge3/envs/muse/lib/libgtest.so.1.15.2 /home/ynistico-iit.local/miniforge3/envs/muse/lib/libboost_thread.so.1.86.0 -lpthread
